REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (115 Crestmont Drive, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Rena Harel.

The sale was confirmed at $710,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $710,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition, (subject to a written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
